---
title: "Joanna Elizabeth Patteson"
---

## Joanna Elizabeth Patteson

**Dates:** (1818/9-23 June 1884)

### Description

half-sister of the Rt. Rev. John Coleridge Patteson

### Biography

She was daughter of Sir John Patteson by his first wife Elizabeth Lee (d.1820) and half-sister of Fanny Patteson;  she died at Andover, and was buried at Feniton 28 June 1884. [will],.

### Letters

- Letter from [late June or early July] 1884. 
- Letter from Novr 9th 1881
- Letter from June 6th [1872?]
- Letter from April 22nd [1872]
- Letter from December 8 [1871]
- Letter from March 23, 1867.
- Letter from May 1866
- Letter from Febry 3d [1866]
- Letter from Sept 3rd [1862][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from May 6, 1862.
- Letter from Whit Monday [19 May] 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
